title: phaius reflexipetalus
intro: Phaius reflexipetalus, also known as the Yellow Poniard Orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phaius reflexipetalus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
